source_jobs.title: Business Development Representative  (US Market)
source_jobs.description:
JOIN EASYGENERATOR AND KICKSTART YOUR SALES CAREER IN THE EDTECH SPACE

Step into an exciting role with an innovative e-learning software company in the EdTech space as a Business Development Representative - US Market, and be part of a high-performing international team.

Easygenerator is a fast growing scale-up revolutionizing e-learning with our award-winning tool. Join us to reshape knowledge sharing and thrive on new challenges.




WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU


 - Grow Your Career: We provide a clear growth path for our BDRs to progress into roles such as Customer Success, Account Executive, and Leadership after mastering the Business Development role. Many team members have moved from BDR to AE within 12–18 months!

 - International Environment: Join a dynamic, international team (40+ nationalities) in a fast-growing scale-up where you can make an immediate impact

 - Training & Onboarding: A 3-week onboarding program covering sales techniques, product knowledge, and industry insights. You’ll receive regular coaching and development opportunities to help you succeed long after onboarding too!

 - AI-First Company - Easygenerator is an AI-first company, not only in the products we build, but in how we operate internally. You’ll get hands-on experience with the latest AI technologies, be trained on how to use AI to work smarter, and develop a future-proof skillset that will keep you ahead in the years to come. Betting your career on a company like Easygenerator means growing with the future of tech from day one.

 - Hybrid working policy

 - Location: Cape Town

 - Working Hours: Eastern Standard Time (EST) – 02:00 p.m. to 11:00 p.m. (your local time)




WHAT WILL YOU BE DOING

 - Proactively identify and engage with key decision-makers through outbound channels

 - Conduct cold calls, send personalized cold emails, and initiate LinkedIn messaging sequences to spark interest and fuel our growth.

 - Qualify leads by understanding their needs, pain points and goals.

 - Create and prioritize strategic target account lists within a defined territory




WHAT YOU WILL BRING

 - A bachelor’s degree or higher

 - 0-2 years of relevant work experience

 - Excellent command of the English language, both spoken and written - Native Level English

 - You enjoy initiating conversations and are comfortable with cold calling and cold outreach

 - You can communicate in a clear, goal-oriented way that leaves no room for interpretation

 - You take initiative, multitask, prioritize and manage time effectively

 - High energy and positive attitude

 - Comfortable working in a fast-paced, international and collaborative environment




READY TO JOIN US?

If you’re eager to kickstart your sales career and make an impact, apply today!

source_jobs.title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT EASYGENERATOR

We’re a fast-growing EdTech scale-up on a mission to revolutionize learning through our award-winning authoring tool. Used by global giants like Kellogg’s, T-Mobile, and Siemens, Easygenerator helps organizations simplify knowledge sharing, fast, easy, and impactful.


We’re an AI-first company, using cutting-edge tools both in our products and internal workflows. You’ll gain hands-on AI experience and develop a future-proof skillset while contributing to a fast-moving, high-impact product.



 


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Manage the full recruitment cycle, from posting job openings to extending offers to successful candidates.

 - Partner closely with hiring managers to understand role requirements and define effective recruiting strategies.

 - Build and maintain talent pipelines and foster strong relationships with top talent by leveraging different channels such as LinkedIn Recruiter, networking events, and other sourcing platforms.

 - Coordinate, schedule, and conduct interviews and drive a positive candidate experience throughout the process.

 - Leverage AI tools and data-driven recruitment solutions to identify, attract, and assess top candidates.

 - Manage employer branding initiatives to attract high-quality applicants and promote Easygenerator.



 


WHAT YOU BRING

 - Excellent command of the English language, both written and verbal.

 - 1-2 years of experience in recruiting, talent acquisition, or a related field, preferably within a SaaS or tech environment.

 - Strong communication and organizational skills.

 - Ability to manage multiple priorities and deliver results in a fast-paced, international environment.

 - High energy, positive attitude, and strong initiative.
   
   


WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU

 - Join a fast-growing scale-up where your impact is visible from day one.

 - Work with a diverse, international team representing 40+ nationalities.

 - Opportunities to develop and pursue new career paths as the company grows.

 - Hands-on experience with the latest AI technologies, tools, and practices.

 - Hybrid working policy: 3 days in the office, 2 days remote.
   
   


READY TO JOIN US?

Apply now and help us deliver world-class talent while shaping the future of EdTech!

source_jobs.title: Revenue Operations Specialist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT EASYGENERATOR

Easygenerator is a fast-growing EdTech scale-up, headquartered in Dubai, on a mission to revolutionize learning with our award-winning authoring tool. Trusted by global giants like Kellogg’s, T-Mobile, and Siemens.

We are an AI-First Company, not only in the products we build but also in how we operate internally. You’ll gain hands-on experience with cutting-edge AI tools, learn how to use AI to work smarter, and develop a future-proof skillset that will keep you ahead in your career.

We’re looking for a Revenue Operations Specialist to join our growing GTM team. This is an excellent opportunity for someone in their career who loves working with data and wants to learn how data powers revenue growth in a fast-scaling SaaS company.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and maintain Salesforce reports, dashboards and data models that track key metrics like pipeline health, forecast accuracy, and conversion rates.

 - Analyze GTM data to help Business Development, Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success make data-driven decisions.

 - Use Power BI and Snowflake to combine data from different systems and create insights across the full customer lifecycle.

 - Support forecasting and revenue performance analysis, including pipeline tracking and deal stage analysis.

 - Collaborate with Data Engineering to ensure data quality and consistency in Salesforce and Snowflake.

 - Work closely with RevOps and other commercial leadership to identify process bottlenecks and recommend improvements.

 - Partner with internal teams on ad-hoc analysis, data requests, and operational projects.

 - Contribute to documentation and process improvements within the Revenue Operations function.
   
   


WHAT YOU BRING

 - 3+ years of experience in data analysis, business operations, or a similar data-focused role.

 - Strong skills in SQL and comfort working with large datasets (Snowflake or similar experience preferred).

 - Hands-on experience creating reports and dashboards in Salesforce.

 - Working knowledge of Power BI (or willingness to learn quickly).

 - Analytical mindset with the ability to translate data into clear business insights.

 - Detail-oriented and organized, with strong problem-solving skills.

 - Excellent communication and collaboration abilities.

 - Interest in SaaS, GTM operations, and learning how Revenue Operations drives company growth.
   


WHY JOIN US

 - Learn the full spectrum of Revenue Operations, from data analytics to GTM process optimization.

 - Get hands-on experience with Salesforce, Snowflake, Power BI, and Gong in a real-world SaaS environment.

 - Collaborate closely with Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, and Data teams.

 - Be part of an AI-driven, high-growth scale-up that values learning, curiosity, and experimentation.

source_jobs.title: Full Stack Developer (Relocation to Alexandria)
source_jobs.description:
Easygenerator is a Dutch EdTech scale-up revolutionizing how organizations share knowledge. Our award-winning e-learning software is used by global enterprises to create engaging learning experiences — and we’re just getting started.

We're an AI-first company, embracing AI not only in our products but in our daily workflows. This means you’ll gain hands-on experience with cutting-edge tools while developing a future-proof skillset alongside a team that's building the future of learning.





WHY JOIN US


 - Relocate to the Coast: Join us in Alexandria and enjoy the beach lifestyle year-round — while earning a competitive salary fixed on USD.

 - Grow with the Future of Tech: Work directly with our CTO and senior engineers and get hands-on AI training as part of our AI-first approach.

 - Accelerate Your Career: Gain real ownership, career coaching, and growth within a fast-moving global scale-up.

 - Work with Top Talent: Collaborate with a high-performing, international team in a flat structure with fast decision-making.

 - Continuous Learning: Enjoy mentorship, a clear growth framework, and flexible time off that adapts to your needs.
   




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and maintain scalable web applications in collaboration with Product and Design teams

 - Own features end-to-end — from technical discussions to release

 - Write clean, tested code (unit + functional)

 - Contribute to architectural decisions and code reviews

 - Solve challenges in a microservices-based system

 - Collaborate on support issues and technical discussions across teams




WHAT YOU BRING

Front-end:

 - Proficiency in Vue.js and/or React.js

 - Strong skills in TypeScript, ES6+, and OOP in JavaScript

 - Experience with CSS3 (SCSS) and build tools (Webpack or Gulp)

 - Familiarity with scalable front-end architecture and testing frameworks (unit + functional)

Back-end:

 - Strong experience with Node.js and NestJS

 - Knowledge of MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, and RabbitMQ

 - Deep understanding of microservices and API design

 - Experience with unit and integration testing for backend services

AI Product Engineering:

 - Actively use of AI assisted workflows (planning, coding & testing)

 - Experience of maintaining and owning AI generated code/features

 - Experience in product design & delivery alongside PM/Design

Bonus If You Have:

 - Team leadership or mentoring experience

 - Contributions to open-source or internal tooling




WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU

 - Work directly with our CTO and senior engineers

 - Real ownership and career growth opportunities

 - Flat structure and fast decision-making

 - Be part of a growing, global company — right from Alexandria

 - Salary Fixed in USD



Apply now and help shape the future of learning — one line of code at a time.

source_jobs.title: Data Engineer
source_jobs.description:
JOIN EASYGENERATOR AND BUILD THE DATA PLATFORM POWERING THE FUTURE OF LEARNING

Step into an exciting role with an innovative e-learning software company in the EdTech space as a Data Engineer.

Easygenerator is a fast-growing scale-up revolutionizing e-learning with our award-winning authoring tool. Join us to build scalable data solutions that enable smarter decisions across Revenue, Product, Marketing, and Business Intelligence.

 


WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING

 - Build and maintain scalable data pipelines and infrastructure using Snowflake, AWS Glue, and modern ETL/ELT frameworks.

 - Integrate data from platforms such as Salesforce, Mixpanel, Segment, Customer.io http://Customer.io, Intercom, Google Analytics, and LinkedIn Ads.

 - Develop reliable data models, warehouses, and data lakes to support reporting and analytics.

 - Implement data quality, monitoring, governance, and security best practices.

 - Build AI-powered self-service analytics capabilities for business users.

 - Partner with Revenue Operations, Product, Marketing and BI teams to deliver impactful data solutions.

 - Optimize platform performance, reliability, and cost efficiency.
   
    


WHAT YOU WILL BRING

 - 3+ years of Data Engineering experience.

 - Strong expertise in Snowflake, including architecture, performance optimization, governance, and security.

 - Experience with AWS Glue (PySpark), ETL/ELT pipelines, and workflow orchestration.

 - Advanced SQL and Python skills.

 - Experience with PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Amazon S3, and modern cloud data architectures.

 - Strong understanding of data modelling, warehousing, and analytics engineering practices.

 - Experience integrating SaaS platforms and revenue data across customer, product, and marketing functions.

 - Knowledge of data governance, privacy, and compliance frameworks such as GDPR.

 - Strong problem-solving skills, ownership mindset, and attention to detail.
   
    


NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience in a B2B SaaS environment.

 - Power BI experience, including data modeling and DAX.

 - Experience with Snowflake Cortex AI and AI-powered analytics solutions.

 - Knowledge of marketing attribution and revenue analytics.

 - Experience with Streamlit, Mixpanel, or similar analytics tools.
   
    


READY TO JOIN US?

If you're passionate about building modern data platforms and helping teams make smarter decisions with data, we'd love to hear from you. Apply today!

source_jobs.title: Head of Demand Generation
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT EASYGENERATOR

We’re a fast-growing EdTech scale-up on a mission to revolutionize learning through our award-winning authoring tool. Used by global giants like Kellogg’s, T-Mobile, and Siemens, Easygenerator helps organizations simplify knowledge sharing: fast, easy, and impactful.

We’re an AI-first company, utilizing cutting-edge tools in both our products and internal workflows. You’ll gain hands-on AI experience and develop a future-proof skillset while contributing to a fast-moving, high-impact product.



ROLE SUMMARY

The Head of Demand Generation owns Easygenerator’s end-to-end demand engine: paid acquisition, website, SEO/GEO, content, and conversion.

This role turns product positioning into high-performing demand programs that drive qualified pipeline, strengthen authority, and improve full-funnel conversion.

A commercially accountable leader, they combine editorial judgment, digital design understanding, and growth discipline to influence pipeline quality and revenue.




CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

Demand Engine & Pipeline

 - Own paid, organic, website, and conversion channels.

 - Translate growth targets into clear priorities and roadmaps.

 - Deliver predictable marketing-sourced pipeline while balancing short- and long-term growth.

Website & Conversion

 - Lead website structure, messaging, UX, landing pages, and CRO.

 - Partner with PMM to ensure clear, differentiated positioning.

 - Maintain clarity, credibility, and performance across touchpoints.

Paid & Organic Growth

 - Lead paid acquisition and €2M+ budget allocation aligned to revenue goals.

 - Optimize for pipeline and revenue impact with strong attribution visibility.

 - Build scalable SEO/GEO and intent-based content clusters to grow authority and long-term pipeline.

Content & Design

 - Lead revenue-focused content aligned to buyer journey and enterprise sales.

 - Ensure digital design supports differentiation, clarity, and conversion.

Revenue & Analytics

 - Own marketing-sourced pipeline targets and key revenue KPIs.

 - Build quarterly growth plans and improve funnel bottlenecks.


TEAM LEADERSHIP

 - Lead paid, content, web, and design teams.

 - Establish scalable processes and experimentation frameworks.

 - Partner closely with PMM, Revenue, and Leadership.


QUALIFICATIONS

 - 5+ years in B2B SaaS digital growth; 2+ years team leadership.

 - Proven pipeline growth and €2M+ budget ownership.

 - Strong expertise in paid, CRO, and SEO/GEO.

 - Editorial judgment, digital design understanding, and enterprise sales awareness.

 - Analytical and commercially driven.

 - Hands-on experience with AI agents and agentic workflows (e.g. Claude, other LLM-based tooling), ideally having designed or shipped systems that automate marketing processes end-to-end, not just explored AI tools in a personal context.


PREFERRED

 - Experience in 20M–100M ARR SaaS.

 - International SaaS exposure.

 - Close collaboration with PMM and Commercial teams.

source_jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT EASYGENERATOR

Easygenerator is a fast-growing EdTech scale-up, headquartered in Dubai, on a mission to revolutionize learning with our award-winning authoring tool. Trusted by global giants like Kellogg’s, T-Mobile, and Siemens, we’re continuing our global expansion and inviting you to join us in simplifying knowledge sharing and transforming the EdTech landscape as part of our high-impact global team.

We are an AI-first company, not only in the products we build, but also in how we operate internally. You’ll gain hands-on experience with the latest AI technologies and develop a future-proof skillset.



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a highly energetic Customer Success Manager to join us!

You will gain experience building trustful relationships with our customers on all levels, in a variety of industries and across a broad geographical area. Easygenerator provides an eLearning authoring software solution (SaaS). We offer an innovative environment where you will be stimulated to think creatively, have a huge impact on our fast-growing business and have some fun along the way!

We established the customer success department in 2017 to help our customers accelerate the value they get out of the product and it did! Since then, the customer success department is growing rapidly. In this role you will own a portfolio of customers and work closely with them in designing and executing success plans to ensure their L&D objectives are met. It is the customer success manager’s mission to add value throughout the customer lifecycle to drive successful renewals, contract expansion and advocacy.



AS AN EASYGENERATOR CUSTOMER SUCCESS MANAGER YOU WILL:

 - Own and manage a portfolio of accounts, ensuring high levels of customer satisfaction, retention, and growth.

 - Build and sustain strong relationships with key stakeholders, acting as a trusted advisor to help customers achieve their business outcomes.

 - Objectively assess account health scores and proactively take action to improve them to maximize customer retention.

 - Identify potential risks within accounts early and lead mitigation plans in collaboration with customer stakeholders.

 - Lead regular check-ins, Quarterly Business Reviews (QBRs), and strategic discussions with customers.

 - Develop and execute strategic success plans tailored to each customer’s objectives and use cases, supporting retention and unlocking opportunities for account expansion and upsell

 - Act as the voice of the customer internally, providing feedback to Product and influencing roadmap decisions.



WHAT YOU BRING

 - A bachelor’s degree or higher.

 - Experience. You have at least 2 years of Customer Success (or (key) account management related) experience

 - Excellent communication skills. You have strong English language skills and can communicate in a clear, goal-oriented way that leaves no room for interpretation. You can take the lead in a conversation, but you also know when it’s time to listen.

 - Commercial mindset. You have a passion for negotiating the best possible outcome for external and internal stakeholders.

 - Customer oriented. You know how to get to the question behind the question and you’re truly focused on helping your customer succeed.

 - A passion for HR tech is preferred. You’re up to date on the latest trends and developments in our discipline.



WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU:

 - Working in a fun & international environment surrounded by a dedicated team.

 - Being part of a fast-growing scale-up environment where you can make an impact from day 1

 - Career framework and growth coaching

 - Develop yourself in the direction you love most: due to our fast growth, many new opportunities are unfolding quickly

 - Remote working policy




READY TO JOIN US?

 - Apply now and be part of shaping the future of EdTech!

 - Lead paid, content, web, and design teams.

 - Establish scalable processes and experimentation frameworks.

 - Partner closely with PMM, Revenue, and Leadership.


QUALIFICATIONS

 - 5+ years in B2B SaaS digital growth; 2+ years team leadership.

 - Proven pipeline growth and €2M+ budget ownership.

 - Strong expertise in paid, CRO, and SEO/GEO.

 - Editorial judgment, digital design understanding, and enterprise sales awareness.

 - Analytical and commercially driven.

 - Hands-on experience with AI agents and agentic workflows (e.g. Claude, other LLM-based tooling), ideally having designed or shipped systems that automate marketing processes end-to-end, not just explored AI tools in a personal context.


PREFERRED

 - Experience in 20M–100M ARR SaaS.

 - International SaaS exposure.

 - Close collaboration with PMM and Commercial teams.

source_jobs.title: Head of Demand Generation (Remote, Portugal)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT EASYGENERATOR

We’re a fast-growing EdTech scale-up on a mission to revolutionize learning through our award-winning authoring tool. Used by global giants like Kellogg’s, T-Mobile, and Siemens, Easygenerator helps organizations simplify knowledge sharing: fast, easy, and impactful.

We’re an AI-first company, utilizing cutting-edge tools in both our products and internal workflows. You’ll gain hands-on AI experience and develop a future-proof skillset while contributing to a fast-moving, high-impact product.

 


ROLE SUMMARY

The Head of Demand Generation owns Easygenerator’s end-to-end demand engine: paid acquisition, website, SEO/GEO, content, and conversion.

This role turns product positioning into high-performing demand programs that drive qualified pipeline, strengthen authority, and improve full-funnel conversion.

A commercially accountable leader, they combine editorial judgment, digital design understanding, and growth discipline to influence pipeline quality and revenue.

 
 


CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

Demand Engine & Pipeline

 - Own paid, organic, website, and conversion channels.

 - Translate growth targets into clear priorities and roadmaps.

 - Deliver predictable marketing-sourced pipeline while balancing short- and long-term growth.

Website & Conversion

 - Lead website structure, messaging, UX, landing pages, and CRO.

 - Partner with PMM to ensure clear, differentiated positioning.

 - Maintain clarity, credibility, and performance across touchpoints.

Paid & Organic Growth

 - Lead paid acquisition and €2M+ budget allocation aligned to revenue goals.

 - Optimize for pipeline and revenue impact with strong attribution visibility.

 - Build scalable SEO/GEO and intent-based content clusters to grow authority and long-term pipeline.

Content & Design

 - Lead revenue-focused content aligned to buyer journey and enterprise sales.

 - Ensure digital design supports differentiation, clarity, and conversion.

Revenue & Analytics

 - Own marketing-sourced pipeline targets and key revenue KPIs.

 - Build quarterly growth plans and improve funnel bottlenecks.


TEAM LEADERSHIP

 - Lead paid, content, web, and design teams.

 - Establish scalable processes and experimentation frameworks.

 - Partner closely with PMM, Revenue, and Leadership.


QUALIFICATIONS

 - 5+ years in B2B SaaS digital growth; 2+ years team leadership.

 - Proven pipeline growth and €2M+ budget ownership.

 - Strong expertise in paid, CRO, and SEO/GEO.

 - Editorial judgment, digital design understanding, and enterprise sales awareness.

 - Analytical and commercially driven.

 - Hands-on experience with AI agents and agentic workflows (e.g. Claude, other LLM-based tooling), ideally having designed or shipped systems that automate marketing processes end-to-end, not just explored AI tools in a personal context.


PREFERRED

 - Experience in 20M–100M ARR SaaS.

 - International SaaS exposure.

 - Close collaboration with PMM and Commercial teams.

source_jobs.title: Senior Business Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
JOIN EASYGENERATOR AND KICKSTART YOUR SALES CAREER IN THE EDTECH SPACE


Easygenerator is a fast-growing scale-up revolutionizing e-learning with our award-winning tool. Join us to reshape knowledge sharing and thrive on new challenges.
Step into an exciting role with an innovative e-learning software company in the EdTech space as a Senior Business Development Representative.




WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU

 - Grow Your Career: We provide a clear growth path for our BDRs to progress into roles such as Account Executive, Customer Success and Leadership after mastering the Business Development role.

 - International Environment: Join a dynamic, international team (40+ nationalities) in a fast-growing scale-up where you can make an immediate impact

 - Training & Onboarding: A 3-week onboarding program covering sales techniques, product knowledge, and industry insights. You’ll receive regular coaching and development opportunities to help you succeed long after onboarding too!

 - AI-First Company: Easygenerator is an AI-first company, not only in the products we build, but in how we operate internally. You’ll get hands-on experience with the latest AI technologies, be trained on how to use AI to work smarter, and develop a future-proof skillset that will keep you ahead in the years to come. Betting your career on a company like Easygenerator means growing with the future of tech from day one.

 - Remote work




WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING

 - Proactively identify and engage with key decision-makers through outbound channels

 - Conduct cold calls, send personalized cold emails, and initiate LinkedIn messaging sequences to spark interest and fuel our growth.

 - Qualify leads by understanding their needs, pain points and goals.

 - Collaborate closely with Account Executives and support BDR team members when needed.

 - Create and prioritize strategic target account lists within a defined territory




WHAT YOU WILL BRING

 - A bachelor’s degree or higher

 - 2-5 years of relevant Business Development or Sales Development experience

 - Excellent command of the English language, both spoken and written - Native Level English

 - Strong outbound prospecting and cold outreach experience

 - You can communicate in a clear, goal-oriented way that leaves no room for interpretation

 - You take initiative, multitask, prioritize and manage time effectively

 - High energy and positive attitude

 - Comfortable working in a fast-paced, international and collaborative environment




READY TO JOIN US?

If you’re eager to kickstart your sales career and make an impact, apply today!

source_jobs.title: Head of Business Development - South Africa
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT EASYGENERATOR

Easygenerator is a fast-growing EdTech scale-up transforming how teams share knowledge. We build award-winning e-learning software used by global enterprises, and we’re just getting started. We’re an AI-first company, using cutting-edge tools both in our products and internal workflows. You’ll gain hands-on AI experience and develop a future-proof skillset while contributing to a fast-moving, high-impact product.

We are looking for a Head of Business Development to lead and scale our Business Development function in South Africa. In this role, you will drive the performance of our outbound organization, coach and develop team leads and individual contributors, and ensure operational excellence across the team. Working closely with the Global Head of Business Development, you will translate global strategy into local execution while building a high-performing, data-driven sales culture in our Cape Town office.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own the performance of the Business Development function in South Africa, including activity, pipeline quality, pipeline-to-revenue conversion, and results, reporting into the Global Head of Business Development

 - Coach and manage the BDR Team Lead, supporting their development and holding them accountable for team performance, while also coaching BDRs directly using data and call insights

 - Set and enforce standards for outbound quality, CRM hygiene, and handovers to Sales, aligned with global standards

 - Run effective 1:1s, performance reviews, and feedback conversations with both the Team Lead and individual BDRs, and identify and address performance or behavioral risks early

 - Lead by example with strong outbound knowledge and credibility, stepping into deals or coaching moments as needed

 - Partner closely with the Global Head of Business Development to localize processes, share market feedback, and feed local insights into global strategy

 - Drive hiring, onboarding, and team-building as the South Africa business development org grows

 - Act as the day-to-day point of contact for the South Africa office, coordinating operational support between the local team and Head Office




WHAT YOU'LL BRING

 - Bachelor's degree or higher

 - Minimum of 5 years of experience in business development/sales within a tech environment, including at least 3 years in a business development people management role (non-negotiable minimum).

 - Strong commercial mindset with a demonstrated track record of driving revenue through outbound motion

 - Proven ability to coach both individual contributors and team leads, using metrics, call insights, and performance data to drive improvement

 - Hands-on outbound sales experience and credibility - comfortable rolling up sleeves and coaching from the front, not just managing from a distance

 - Strong organizational skills, able to juggle people, priorities, data, and operational coordination with clarity and control

 - Clear, direct, and confident communication skills, including with senior stakeholders and global leadership

 - Comfort operating with a high degree of autonomy day-to-day, while aligning closely with a global function and reporting structure

 - Experience specifically managing or developing a Team Lead/manager (rather than only individual contributors) is a strong plus

 - Native-level English, written and spoken; based in Cape Town, South Africa




READY TO JOIN US?

If you’re eager to make an impact, apply today!

source_jobs.title: GTM Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Join Easygenerator and help build the AI-powered engine behind our go-to-market growth
Step into an exciting role with an innovative e-learning software company in the EdTech space as a GTM Engineer. Easygenerator is a fast-growing scale-up revolutionizing e-learning with our award-winning authoring tool.

Join us to help build and automate the systems that power smarter, faster go-to-market execution across Sales, Marketing, and Revenue Operations.


What you will be doing

 - Learn to support the setup and maintenance of workflows across our CRM and GTM tools, with guidance from the team.

 - Use AI tools (like Claude) to automate repetitive tasks, summarize data, and speed up manual processes.

 - Help maintain clean, reliable data across our systems so the team can trust what they're looking at.

 - Assist in building and testing simple automations, such as trigger-based workflows, notifications, and reporting.

 - Document workflows and processes clearly so they can be maintained and improved over time.

 - Flag broken or inefficient processes and take initiative in proposing fixes, even when not asked.

 - Partner with Sales, Marketing, and Revenue Operations to understand pain points and, with support, translate them into practical automations.

 - Continuously learn new tools and AI capabilities relevant to GTM, and bring what you learn back to the team.



What you will bring

 - Experience: 0-2 years of experience or academic exposure to marketing, sales, business operations, or a related field. A genuine interest in the space and a willingness to learn is what matters most.

 - AI-Native Habits: Hands-on experience using AI tools (such as Claude or ChatGPT) in daily life, studies, or personal projects to solve problems, speed up tasks, or explore new ideas.

 - Communication Skills: Clear, confident communicator, comfortable explaining your thinking and asking questions when something is unclear.

 - Organizational Discipline: Proven ability to manage multiple tasks, deadlines, or projects in parallel.

 - Coachability: A track record of taking feedback well and quickly applying it to improve.



Nice to have

 - Exposure to no-code automation tools such as Zapier, Make, or n8n.

 - Basic familiarity with CRM platforms (HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive).

 - Any personal projects involving automation, AI tools, or data.

 - Basic exposure to SQL or scripting.



Ready to Join Us?
If you're curious about AI, love figuring out how things work, and want to launch your career at the intersection of technology and go-to-market strategy, we'd love to teach you the rest. Apply today!

source_jobs.title: SEM Manager
source_jobs.description:
Join Easygenerator and own the paid search engine driving our growth

Step into an exciting role with an innovative e-learning software company in the EdTech space as our SEM Manager. Easygenerator is a fast-growing scale-up revolutionizing e-learning with our award-winning authoring tool.

We're looking for an advanced, data-obsessed SEM Manager to take full ownership of our paid search program across Google Ads and Microsoft Advertising, in Alexandria and measured on pipeline and revenue efficiency, not vanity clicks.



What you will be doing

 - Own our paid search strategy and daily execution across Google Ads and Microsoft Ads, spanning Search, Performance Max, Demand Gen, and Shopping.

 - Run multilingual campaigns across multiple markets.

 - Use AI to scale smarter, steering Smart Bidding and Performance Max, and using tools like scripts and LLMs to expand keywords, test ad copy, and flag anomalies.

 - Push us toward value-based bidding, connecting ad accounts to our CRM so algorithms optimize for real pipeline and revenue.

 - Own conversion tracking and data quality, including Enhanced Conversions, server-side tracking, and attribution.

 - Own landing pages and CRO, running A/B tests with content, design, and product marketing to lift conversion rate.

 - Run structured experiments and turn results into an ongoing optimization roadmap.

 - Manage budget, forecasting, and monthly spend.

 - Build dashboards that turn CAC, CPL, ROAS, and pipeline data into clear insights.

 - Keep an eye on the market through keyword research and competitor tracking.

What you will bring

 - 5+ years in SEM / paid search, with advanced, at-scale experience in Google Ads (Microsoft Ads a plus).

 - Hands-on experience using AI to scale campaigns, Smart Bidding, Performance Max, scripts, or similar tools.

 - Strong CRO skills and experience testing landing pages.

 - Sharp analytical skill, comfortable in Looker Studio, or similar (SQL or spreadsheet modelling a plus).

 - Solid understanding of conversion tracking, attribution, and value-based bidding.

 - Experience running campaigns across multiple markets and languages.

 - Background in a tech start-up or scale-up, ideally B2B SaaS, with a good grasp of the full funnel and unit economics (CAC, LTV, payback).

 - Bachelor's or higher in marketing or another quantitative, test-driven field.

 - Excellent written and spoken English; German, French, or Italian is a plus.

 - A genuine growth mindset, you experiment fast, learn from what doesn't work, and keep pushing performance further.
   
    

Ready to Join Us?

If you're passionate about owning paid search end to end and turning data into pipeline and revenue, we'd love to hear from you. Apply today!

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT EASYGENERATOR

We’re a fast-growing EdTech scale-up on a mission to revolutionize learning through our award-winning authoring tool. Used by global companies like Kellogg’s, T-Mobile, and Siemens, Easygenerator helps organizations simplify knowledge sharing: fast, easy, and impactful.

We’re an AI-first company, utilizing cutting-edge tools in both our products and internal workflows. You’ll gain hands-on AI experience and help shape how AI changes the way companies create, manage, and consume knowledge.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a Senior Product Manager to join our Product team and help shape the next generation of Easygenerator.

This is not a role where you simply manage a backlog or execute a roadmap handed to you. We’re looking for someone who can take ownership of an important product area, deeply understand customer problems, define a clear product direction, and work with a cross-functional team to ship high-impact solutions.

AI is a core part of where Easygenerator is going. We’re looking for a product manager who is not just “interested in AI”, but actively uses AI tools, understands how AI can change user workflows, and can separate real product value from hype. You should be comfortable exploring AI-native product experiences, working with technical teams on AI-powered capabilities, and thinking critically about quality, trust, adoption, and usability.

You’ll work closely with Engineering, Design, Analytics, Product Marketing, Customer Success, and Sales to build products that solve real customer problems and contribute to Easygenerator’s growth.




WHAT YOU’LL DO


OWN A PRODUCT AREA

 - Take ownership of a meaningful product domain within Easygenerator

 - Define the product direction, priorities, and success metrics for your area

 - Translate company strategy into focused product bets and clear team goals


DRIVE DISCOVERY AND PRODUCT STRATEGY

 - Build a deep understanding of our customers, users, competitors, and market

 - Turn ambiguous problems into clear opportunities and well-framed solutions

 - Use qualitative and quantitative insights to make strong product decisions


BUILD AI-POWERED PRODUCT EXPERIENCES

 - Identify where AI can meaningfully improve user workflows, not just add novelty

 - Work with Engineering and Design to shape AI-powered features that are useful, trustworthy, and easy to use

 - Think critically about AI quality, evaluation, edge cases, and user trust


LEAD CROSS-FUNCTIONAL EXECUTION

 - Work closely with Engineering and Design from problem definition through delivery

 - Keep the team focused on outcomes while making smart scope trade-offs

 - Ensure we ship high-quality product improvements with measurable impact


PARTNER ACROSS THE BUSINESS

 - Collaborate with Sales, Customer Success, Marketing, and Support to understand customer needs and market signals

 - Communicate product direction clearly to stakeholders across the company

 - Bring structure and clarity without creating unnecessary process
   
   


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR


MUST-HAVE EXPERIENCE

 - 5+ years of product management experience, ideally in B2B SaaS

 - Experience owning a product area end-to-end, from discovery to delivery and iteration

 - Strong track record of shipping products or features that created measurable customer or business impact

 - Experience working in cross-functional teams with Engineering, Design, Analytics, and commercial stakeholders

 - Strong understanding of product discovery, prioritization, roadmap planning, and outcome-based product management

 - Experience working on complex products with multiple user types, workflows, permissions, or integrations


AI MINDSET AND CAPABILITY

 - Hands-on experience using AI tools in your own work

 - Strong understanding of how AI can change user workflows and product experiences

 - Ability to evaluate AI product ideas critically, including quality, trust, usability, and adoption risks

 - Comfortable working with tec

notes: EdTech scale-up with AI-first approach, strong focus on sales and business development
